Improved fleet observability and health telemetry in partnership with multiple TITAN-style functions, collecting and analyzing system-failure data to **define trends**, drive proactive sustainment, and inform resource allocation.

Led 0→1 build of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling that **cut operational toil 30%** and shifted incident-driven execution to a scalable, self-sufficient model.

Coordinated technical and non-technical efforts across business, engineering, and sustainment functions under executive visibility, bridging a **$1.5B+** sovereign-cloud network-isolation test and **maximizing capability availability** for end users.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic-search tool, **cutting lookup time 83%** and improving fleet-wide knowledge accessibility.

Engineered a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil across **140+ teams**, giving leadership the failure-data visibility to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support.
